generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T CHROMICUM ACIDUM. Chromium trioxide, CrO 3 ,H 2 O. Preparation , Solution of seven grains in 100 drops of water for the θ (Duffield's provings). Authorities. 1 , Henry Duffield's provings, Inaug. Thesis at Phil. Hom. Med. Coll., 1852, proving with the 5th dil. (first, second, and third days), three doses daily; 2 , Ibid., proving with 6th dil., three doses daily for four days; 3 , Ibid., proving with 30th dil., two doses daily for four days; 4 , Ibid. (a second prover), proving with 7th dil., two doses daily for four days; 5 , Ibid., proving with 30th dil., two or three doses daily for four or five days; 6 , Dr. G. Oehme, provings on self with low dilutions (symptoms appeared only after long continued and repeated dosing), N. Y. J. of Hom., 1, 367. MIND. ► Great confusion of mind, [3] . ► Memory affected to such a degree that he was at a loss, when writing, to make several of the letters of the alphabet, [3] . HEAD. ► Sensation of vertigo, which inclined him constantly to the right side, while walking, at 10 A.M., [3] . ► Sensation of lightness of the head, like vertigo, with heat in face, at 10 P.M., [1] . ► Pain from ball of right eye up into the interior of the brain, with soreness of the orb to the touch, at 12 M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Feeling of fulness in head (fourth day), [2] . ► Fulness of head, at night, with peculiar sensation of lightness at the heart, and vertigo when descending stairs (fourth day), [2] . ► Throbbing and sensation of fulness in forepart of head, and of emptiness in chest, with soreness on pressure, and cold feet (fifth day), [2] . ► Awoke, at 5 A.M., with sensation of fulness in vertex and frontal region, [3] . [10.] ► Heavy pain along coronal suture, extending backward, occupying all the parietal portion of the head, at 10 A.M., lasting six hours; the same pain, lasting the same time, on two succeeding days, [5] . EYE. ► Dull pain over left eye, as if headache would set in, [1] . ► Eyes sore, and feel heavy as if inflamed (fifth day), [2] . ► Throbbing, pulsative sensation from region of heart to left eye and left side of head, with general feeling of fulness in frontal region, at 10 A.M., [1] . ► Diminished vision, [6] . EAR. ► Occasional sensation in right ear as if water was in it; it appears and disappears suddenly, [6] . NOSE. ► Sensation during the eating of the food, which tastes well and natural, as if the exhaled air smelt putrid, almost causing nausea. He smells several times of the food, thinking that the stench might proceed from that, [6] . FACE. ► Lips dry and disposed to chap, [3] . MOUTH. ► Teeth. ► Sudden violent pain in the night, in several undecayed teeth on left side, especially in the lower jaw; while the pain lasts the corresponding arteries beat more violently, [6] . ► Toothache in the left lower jaw, for a short time, in the morning, after the usual rinsing of the mouth with cold water, [6] . [20.] ► Repeated toothache of short duration, especially in the lower jaw, on the right side. During the attacks, the corresponding artery beats more violently than on the other side, [6] . ► Soon after going to bed (10 o'clock P.M.), two attacks of very violent toothache on right side; each attack lasted about ten or fifteen minutes, with a free interval of several minutes. During the second attack, the painful teeth seemed too long; the pain extended into the forehead; a pain between the head, left shoulder-blade, and shoulder, grew much better. During the pain, he was frequently obliged to change his position. After the second attack, such uneasiness in limbs that he was obliged to get up and walk about. The teeth of the right side felt too long, even the next morning, and cold water produced pain, [6] . ► Taste. ► A swallow of diluted Madeira tastes singularly disagreeable, [6] . THROAT. ► Accumulation of tough mucus in throat, with constant inclination to swallow it, as it could not be easily hawked up, [2] . ► White phlegm in throat, causing hawking, especially in morning, [6] . STOMACH. ► No appetite for breakfast, [3] . ► Qualmishness of the stomach, at 2 P.M., after dinner, lasting two hours, [5] . ► Nausea, transient, at different times, especially when the stomach is empty, [6] . ► Nausea, gradually increasing, with sensation as if a stool would follow, half an hour after a simple supper, [6] . ► Vomiting of food several times, and afterwards, three times, of bile, with much retching, at intervals of five or ten minutes, accompanied by warm perspiration and natural heat. Quick walking about relieves the nausea which precedes each vomiting. Between the attacks of vomiting, a kind of pressure and fulness in stomach, so that he is obliged to loosen his clothes. Soon after the last vomiting, sleep for half an hour, after which slight pressure or heaviness in stomach (after a few drops of 1st dec. dil., shortly before supper), [6] . ABDOMEN. [30.] ► Slightly acute pains in left hypochondria, [1] . ► Uneasiness in bowels before rising in morning, similar to the premonitory symptoms of diarrha, which passed away on rising, [5] . ► Pain in colon on waking in the morning, accompanied with rumbling of wind, which passed off on rising (second day), [5] . ► Awakened at 4 A.M. by a feeling of uneasiness in the lower part of the abdomen, which was very sore to the touch, especially along the course of the colon, accompanied with nausea and frequent eructations and retchings, throwing off white mucus, [3] . ► Severe sharp pain in the hypogastric region and along the ascending colon, at 6 A.M., which became very severe and cutting and lasted half an hour, when he was relieved by a profuse diarrha which lasted three hours; then the symptoms all ceased, and headache, the same at the day before, set in, followed by the same sickness of the stomach, both of which lasted until 4 P.M., as before, [5] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Piles, internal and bleeding (third day), [2] . ► Very painful external piles on left side of anus (second day), [2] . ► Hæmorrhoidal discharge from the anus during stool, at 8 A.M., [2] . ► Copious hæmorrhoidal discharge during stool, at 8 A.M., [3] . ► Pretty copious hæmorrhoidal discharge from the anus during stool, with weakness in the small of the back, at 8 A.M., [2] . STOOL. [40.] ► Watery diarrha, with nausea and dizziness (in a girl of 14 years), [6] . ► Diarrhic discharge from bowels at 8 A.M., after which pulse rose to 75, [3] . ► Small stool of mucus and knotty fæces at 8.30 P.M., [3] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Attack of strangury on waking in morning, after dreaming of it at night, and from which he did not get relief for nearly two hours (fifth day), [2] . CHEST. ► Weakness in chest, [3] . ► Stricture in chest in region of the heart at 10 A.M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Sensation of rawness or soreness in chest, with slight, dry, hacking cough (fourth day), [2] . ► Throbbing pulsation through chest at 12 M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Slight pain and throbbing pulsation in left lung (fifth day), [2] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Sudden violent stitch in region of heart; the pain disappeared only gradually, after several minutes, [6] . [50.] ► Pulse full and a little accelerated, [1] . ► Pulse 84 at 4 P.M. (fifth day), [2] . ► Pulse 82 at 10 A.M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Pulse 80 at 7.30 A.M., 76 at 3 P.M. (second day), [3] . ► Pulse 75 at 4 P.M., [3] . ► Pulse 72 at 8 A.M. (fifth day), [2] . ► Pulse 70 at 8 A.M., [3] . ► Pulse 70 all day, [3] . ► Pulse 68 at 3 P.M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Pulse 64 at 7 A.M., [2] . [60.] ► Pulse 64 at 9 P.M., [2] . ► Pulse 62 at 10 A.M. (normal pulse 55), [2] . ► Pulse 58 at 12 M. (fourth day), [3] . ► Pulse slower, [3] . ► Pulse below standard, [4] . ► Pulse 58 (normal pulse 64), [5] . ► Pulse 56 at 10 A.M., [2] . ► Pulse 56 at 12 M., [2] . ► Pulse 52 at 4 A.M., [3] . ► Pulse 48 at 7 A.M., [2] . [70.] ► Very remarkable irregularity of pulse; on some days, in a single hour, the variation would be from 60 to 84, the pulsations scarcely ever being the same in two successive hours, [3] . ► Pulse 48 at 7 A.M.; 64 at 3 P.M. (second day), [2] . NECK AND BACK. ► Stiffness of the muscles on left side of back of neck at 10 A.M. (fourth day), [3] . ► An apparently deepseated pain for almost three weeks, with stiffness, at times more severe, at times less, in left shoulder-blade and left part of back of neck, up to occiput; for several days it was so violent that the slightest motion of the affected part was very painful; at night even sleep was impaired, as only certain positions were endurable; the rising from a lying position caused much pain, and turning the head to the left or backward was impossible; the pains were least felt when standing and walking; at times the pain extended into the left olecranon, to the muscles on the chest below left shoulder and spina; all muscles connected with the shoulder-blade were more or less affected and painful to touch; the least draft of air increased the pain; the use of the left arm was impeded; in drawing a long breath, a stitch in the upper left part of chest, near the shoulder; coughing caused very violent pain over the whole upper left part of chest, and deep coughing was impossible; pressure on the chest; the pain moved from the left shoulder-blade down to the pelvis, and the lumbar region was sensitive, [6] . ► Pain in the lumbar region at 9 P.M., [2] . ► A sharp shooting pain from the lumbar vertebræ to the crest of the ilium of right side, while sitting, at 6 P.M., [3] . ► Weakness and pain in small of back at 4 P.M., [3] . ► Shooting pain from small of back into left hip-bone at 3 P.M. (fourth day), [3] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► The arms fall asleep easily, [6] . ► Dull aching pain on top of left shoulder, as if from great fatigue, which lasted two hours, at 10 A.M., [2] . [80.] ► Several times, a short-lasting growing pain, with lameness, in the middle of the left brachium, in front, as if from a severe blow, [6] . ► Short-lasting slight pain in right elbow, [6] . ► Transient pain in left elbow, [6] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► A kind of hitching in left knee-joint when walking, [3] . ► Weakness and knocking of left knee-joint when walking, at 8 P.M., [3] . ► Rheumatic feeling in right knee-joint, afternoon and evening (third day), [3] . ► Sensation of paralysis in right leg, from knee down (at 10 A.M.), [2] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Tiredness and weakness, [6] . ► Heavy, dull, stupid, [6] . ► The pains are worse and last longer on the left side than on the right, [6] . SKIN. [90.] ► Disagreeable prickling and itching here and there, mostly in evening, with uneasiness in the limbs, so that he was obliged to get up from sitting or lying and walk about, [6] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Excessively sleepy an hour before usual bedtime, [5] . ► Notwithstanding the good sleep at night, great sleepiness in daytime, but if he lies down for a nap, cannot fall asleep, [6] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Late going to sleep, with restlessness during night and anxious dreams, [1] . ► Restless night, with sensation of swelling of the eyeballs, which continued till after he awoke; they felt as if much enlarged (second day), [3] . ► Wakes up at early dawn, and cannot fall asleep again, although still sleepy and not excited, [6] . ► Awoke at 5 A.M., very restless; could not lie quiet five minutes at a time, [5] . ► Dreams. ► Unpleasant dreams at night, which cannot be remembered (second day), [3] . ► Distressing dreams at night; about to be put to death by poison, and at the same time innocent of crime, [2] . ► Many dreams at night; dreams of crossing a stream on horseback; the stream and the water on him freezes, [4] . [100.] ► Dreamed at night that he had an attack of strangury, which on awaking in morning proved to be the case, and from which he did not get relief for nearly two hours (fifth day), [2] . FEVER. ► General coldness all over, [4] . ► Could not get warm for nearly a week after finishing medicine, [5] . ► Sensation of coldness in back of neck at 10 A.M. (third day), [3] . ► Feet cold (naturally, burning hot), (fourth day), [2] . ► Cold feet, even when walking, at 12 M. (fourth day), [3] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), After rinsing mouth with cold water, toothache; phlegm in throat; before rising, uneasiness in bowels; on waking, pain in colon; uneasiness in lower abdomen; pain in hypogastric region; on waking, attack of strangury. ► ( Forenoon, at 10 o'clock ), Pain along coronal suture; sensation from heart to eye, etc.; stricture in chest; stiffness of muscles of neck; sensation in leg; cold sensation in back of neck. ► ( Noon ), Pain into brain, etc.; pulsation through chest; cold feet. ► ( Afternoon ), At 2 o'clock, after dinner, qualmishness; at 6 o'clock, pain from lumbar region to crest of ilium; weakness, etc., in small of back. ► ( Evening ), Prickling, etc. ► ( Afternoon and evening ), Feeling in knee-joint. ► ( Night ), Fulness of head, etc.; pain in teeth; at 10 o'clock, toothache, etc. ► ( Draft of air ), Causes or increases the pains; pain in shoulder-blade, etc. ► ( Cold water ), Causes or increases the pains. ► ( While walking ), Sensation of vertigo; weakness, etc., of knee-joint. ► Amelioration. ► ( Standing ), Pains in shoulder-blade, etc. ► ( Walking ), Pains in shoulder-blade, etc. ► ( Quick walking ), Causes relief; nausea. SUPPLEMENT: CHROMICUM ACIDUM. Authority. 7 , H. Wardner, M.D., Phil. Med. and Surg. Rep., vol. xx, 1869, p. 362, a man, æt. thirty-six years, took a solution containing about 15 grains. ► His features contracted, his countenance assumed a leaden hue, and his eyes sank (within three minutes); countenance partially resumed color (after two hours), [7] . ► Vomited very profusely; first the contents of the stomach, then a large quantity of bile; and lastly, considerable blood (within three minutes); stomach still irritable (after two hours), [7] . ► Great burning pain in stomach (after two hours), [7] . ► Two or three copious alvine dejections (in three minutes), [7] . Tiredness and weakness. For a second : sudden jerk of eyeballs. Appears and disappears suddenly : sensation as of water in right ear. Transitory : pains in elbows. At intervals of 5 to 10 minutes : retching and vomiting. Lasting 10 to 15 minutes : attacks of toothache. After several minutes : sudden stitches in region of heart gradually disappear. Lasting half an hour : pain in hypogastric region and along ascending colon. For two hours : pain over top of left shoulder ; attack of strangury. Lasting three hours : morning diarrhœa. Throughout day : pain in left scapula ; occasionally pains in muscles until evening. For two days : mind in a state of confusion. For one week : sensation of coldness. For three weeks : deep-seated pain with distress, at times more severe, at others less, in left shoulder and neck. Periodical : ranula. Pains < on left side and lasting longer than on the right. Left : shooting pains in temple ; pulsative throbbing from region of heart to eye and side of head ; slight pains in hypochondrium with fulness of head ; cutting pains across eyeball ; throbbing in eye ; dull pain over eye ; sudden jerking pains in ear ; cold feeling in meatus ; pain in undecayed teeth ; toothache in lower jaw ; pain over whole upper part of chest on coughing ; boring pain in side of chest below axilla ; deep-seated pain in back of chest ; stitch in upper part of chest on drawing a long breath ; slight pain in lung ; twitching in knee joint ; deep-seated pain with distress in shoulder, shoulder blade and neck ; pain moved from shoulder blade down to pelvis ; dull pain at inner angle of scapula ; jerking pains in ear ; shooting pain into hip bone ; dull aching pain over top of shoulder ; pain in scapula ; transient pain in elbow ; short-lasting, growing pain with lameness in brachium ; drawing, deep-seated pain in upper half of thigh ; twitching in knee ; weakness of knee joint. Right : lightness in head inclines him to side when walking ; dull, pressive pain over eye on awaking in morning ; pain from eyeball and aching teeth into anterior portion of brain ; as of water in ear ; dulness and uneasy feeling in eye and nostril ; pressive pain over eye in morning ; violent toothache after going to bed ; teeth feel too long after toothache ; toothache in lower jaw ; from lumbar region round to cecum, pain like flatulence ; pain in loins and side ; rheumatic pains about shoulder ; sharp shooting to crest of ilium ; short lasting pain in elbow ; itching in palm of hand ; rheumatic feeling in knee ; sensation of paralysis from knee down ; drawing pains in bones and ligaments of foot ; pressure in hypochondrium ; dull, pressive pain over eye. As of a vacuum at heart ; of tiredness and weakness ; as of water in ear ; as if painful teeth were too long ; as if root of lung could not expand and was painful on deep inspiration ; as from a severe blow in middle of left brachium ; as of paralysis from right knee down ; as if exhaled air smelled putrid. Pain : from teeth and right eyeball into anterior brain ; in left hypochondrium ; from toothache, extends into ear and forehead ; between head, left shoulder-blade and shoulder ; in teeth, from cold water ; in hypogastric region and along ascending colon ; in colon ; like flatulence, in right side from lumbar region round to cecum ; in loins and right side ; over whole upper left part of chest ; in left lung ; under apex of heart ; from left shoulder blade down to pelvis ; in back and loins ; in lumbar region ; in small of back ; in left scapula ; in elbows ; in legs, especially above knees, on firm pressure ; in knee ; at root of toes on treading on ground ; suddenly shifting to various parts of trunk. Cutting : across left eyeball. Boring : in left side of chest below axilla ; about fourth rib ; in inner side of thighs, chiefly the left. Stitch : in left chest near shoulder ; in region of heart, sudden and violent. Shooting : in left temple ; in epigastrium ; from small of back into left hip bone ; from lumbar vertebræ to crest of ilium on right side ; about balls of feet. Pricking : in tongue ; in skin ; in various parts. Drawing : in left scapula ; in upper half of left thigh ; as if in the bone, extending to hip joint ; in bones and ligaments of right foot ; about balls of feet. Burning : superficial, about middle dorsal spines, in toes like chilblains. Sudden jerking : in left ear ; of both eyeballs. Sudden violent pain : in teeth in left side. Fine drawing, nervous pain in region of heart, at times reaching through chest to shoulder and neck. Quivering pains : in inner side of thighs, chiefly the left. Soreness : of orb to touch ; of eyes as if inflamed ; of mouth when chewing ; of throat ; in chest. Deep-seated pain : in back and front of left side of chest ; in left shoulder, shoulder blade, and left part of back of neck up to occiput ; in hands and fingers ; in upper half of left thigh, in front, extending to hip joint ; in inner side of thighs, chiefly the left. Pressive pain : at apex of heart ; in right hypochondrium. Dull, pressive pain : over right eye. Dull, aching pain : over top of left shoulder, as if from great fatigue. Dull pain : over left eye as if headache would set in ; at inner angle of left scapula ; at inferior angles of both scapulæ ; in hands and fingers. Heavy pain : along coronal suture ; in muscles of neck and shoulders and various parts of trunk. Pinching : in epigastrium. Rawness : in chest. Smarting : in eyelids ; around eyes ; in inner canthi. Bruised feeling : in legs, especially above knees. Indistinct pains like a strain about feet and ankles. Aching : in epigastrium. Rheumatic pains : about right shoulder ; about various parts of back. Clucking, painful sensation on deep inspiration when lying on heart. Growing pains : in left brachium. Transitory pains : in elbows ; in left brachium ; in various parts. Sensitiveness : of brain ; of lumbar region. Heaviness : in eyelids ; in stomach. Throbbing pulsation : from region of heart to left eye and side of head ; in occiput ; in left eye ; in left lung ; through chest. Pressure : in stomach ; on chest ; in right hypochondrium, at edge of false ribs, then in region of bladder. Stricture : in chest, in region of heart. Twitching : in left knee joint. Stiffness : in muscles, chiefly in shoulder blades, back of neck ; between shoulders and in hips. Rheumatic feeling : in right knee joint. Sick feeling : in abdomen. Fulness : of head ; in upper and forepart of head ; in stomach ; about rectum. Emptiness : in chest. Lightness : of head ; at heart as of a vacuum. Dull feeling : in legs, especially above knees. Fatigued feeling : in legs, especially above knees. Weakness : in small of back ; of chest ; of knee joints ; of l. knee joint. Lameness : in left brachium. Falling asleep : of arms. Uneasiness : in right eye and nostril ; in limbs ; in bowels, similar to premonitory symptoms of diarrhœa ; in muscles, chiefly in shoulder blades, back of neck, between shoulders and in hips. Heat : in face. Coldness : general, he cannot get warm. Cold feeling : in small spot in meatus ; on back of neck. Itching : around eyes ; in inner canthi ; in armpits ; in palm of right hand ; at balls of feet ; in feet, toes and various parts. Dryness : in right eye and nostril ; of mouth. Inflammation and destruction of epithelium of mucous membranes. Pseudo-membrane similar to that of angina faucium and croup. Gangrene. (OBS :) For disinfection of cholera and fever stools. (OBS :) To arrest fetid discharges and correct fetid odors. TOUCH. PASSIVE MOTION. INJURIES. [45] [Chr. ac.]. Touch : soreness of orb to ; abdomen tender to ; muscles of shoulder blade painful to. Pressure : a spot about an inch to right of middle lumbar spine sensitive to ; pain above knees on ; on treading on ground feet at root of toes painful. Obliged to loosen clothes to > pressure and fulness in stomach. (OBS :) To prevent suppuration and putrefaction in wounds. Girl, æt. 14 ; watery diarrhœa.

nose.text: Ulcer and scabs in nose. Offensive smell. Corrosive pain. Ozæna (Aur)
Uneasy feeling in right nostril. Fetid, musty smell in posterior nares, chiefly perceived during expiration, after breakfast and dinner. (OBS :) Ozæna.

mouth_throat.text: Diphtheria; sore throat. Tough mucus, with inclination to swallow it; worse, causing hawking. Post-nasal tumors

Toothache, with pain extending into ear. Soon after going to bed, 10 P. M., two attacks of very violent toothache on right side ; each attack lasted about ten to fifteen minutes, with a free interval of several minutes ; during the second attack painful teeth seemed as if too long ; pain extended into forehead. A pain between the head, left shoulder blade and shoulder grew much better during toothache ; during the pain he was frequently obliged to change his position. After the second attack of toothache such uneasiness in limbs that he was obliged to get up and walk about, teeth of right side felt too long even next morning, and cold water produced pain in teeth. Repeated toothache of short duration, especially in lower jaw, right side ; during attacks of toothache the corresponding artery beats more violently than on the other side. In the night sudden violent pain in several undecayed teeth, left side, especially in lower jaw ; while the pain lasts the corresponding arteries beat more violently. In morning after usual rinsing of mouth with cold water, toothache in left lower jaw for a short time. A swallow of diluted Madeira tastes singularly disagreeable. Metallic taste in mouth before dinner. *. Pricking in tongue. *. During the eating of food, which tastes well and natural, sensation as if exhaled air smelled putrid, almost causing nausea. Periodical ranula with dry mouth, < afternoon, sore when chewing ; at same time blind piles and costiveness. (OBS :) Scorbutic diseases of gums. Accumulation of tough mucus in throat, with constant disposition to swallow it, because it cannot easily be hawked up. White phlegm in throat causing hawking, especially mornings. (OBS :) Ulceration of mucous membrane of mouth and pharynx. Sore throat awakens at night, is very painful, with short cough and retching. Angina diphtheritica, crouposa and gangrenosa.

extremities.text: Uneasiness in limbs. Pain in shoulder-blades and back of neck. Pain in knees and balls of feet. Drawing pain in soles while walking

Dull, aching pain, over the top of left shoulder as if from great fatigue, for two hours. Pains in left scapula *. Drawing pains in left scapula occasionally throughout day, but most in morning. *. Pain about left scapula in morning. *. Itching in armpits at night. *. Transitory, undefined pains in the elbows, in the morning. *. Short-lasting, slight pain in right elbow. Transient pain in left elbow. Several times a short-lasting, growing pain with lameness, in middle of left brachium, in front, as from a severe blow. Use of left arm was impeded. Arms fall asleep easily. Frequent dull, deep-seated pains in the hands and fingers. Itching in palm of right hand, in morning. Drawing, deep-seated pain, as if in bone, in upper half of left thigh, in front, extending to hip joint. In bed a severe quivering, boring, deep-seated pain in inner side of thighs, chiefly left. *. A dull, bruised, fatigued feeling in legs, especially above knees, with some pain on firm pressure ; for several days. *. Pains in knee. *. A kind of twitching in left knee joint. In afternoon a rheumatic feeling in right knee joint, continuing till 10 P. M. Knee joints weak and knocking. Weakness of left knee joint, knocking a little when walking. Sensation of paralysis from right knee down. Occasionally indistinct pains like a strain about feet and ankles. *. Sharp drawing pains in bones and ligaments of right foot. *. Shooting, drawing pains about balls of feet. *. Itching and drawing pains in balls of feet, at root of toes, painful on treading on ground. *. Itching in feet, toes and various parts in evening. Burning and itching in toes like chilblains. Cold feet, with fulness in head, giddiness, and with chest symptoms. Uneasiness, stiffness and dull pain in muscles, in morning ; chiefly in shoulder blades and back of neck, also between shoulders and in hips ; coming occasionally during day until evening. Cold hands and feet. Rheumatic attacks.

stool_rectum.text: Watery, frequent, copious, with nausea and vertigo. Hæmorrhoids, internal and bleeding. Weakness in small of back

Frequent passage of flatus for several days. Fulness about rectum, and difficult evacuation of a soft, scanty stool. *. After tea a sudden and pressing desire to stool, with scanty, thin, lumpy evacuation. *. Diarrheic discharge from bowels, after which the pulse rose to 75 (from 52). Small stool of mucus and knotty feces. Watery diarrhœa, with nausea and dizziness. Blind piles with costiveness. External piles disappeared, became internal and bleeding. Copious discharge of hemorrhoidal blood. Discharge of hemorrhoidal blood with weakness in small of back.

keynotes.text: color="#800000">CHROMICUM ACIDUM Chromic Acid Diphtheria, post-nasal tumors, and epithelioma of the tongue have been benefited by this drug. Bloody, foul-smelling lochia. Symptoms come and go suddenly, and return periodically; offensive discharges.

mental_emotional.text: Mind in a state of confusion for two days ; memory aggravated at times to such a degree that he found himself at loss to know how to make several of the letters in the alphabet. Delirious states. θ Phrenitis. Quarrelsome in delirium. θ Phrenitis. Dull confusion in head, in forenoon. Is heavy, dull, stupid. Sensation of lightness of head like vertigo, with heat in face ; face flushed ; pulse full, slightly accelerated. At 10 o'clock, while walking, lightness in head which inclined him continually to right side. Giddiness when going down-stairs.

head.text: Pain extends into anterior portion of brain from right eyeball, and from aching teeth. Fulness of head ; in the evening lightness at heart as if a vacuum was there ; giddiness when going down-stairs, and cold feet. Woke at 5 A. M. with feeling of fulness in upper and forepart of head. Shooting pains in left temple. *. Pulsative, throbbing sensation from region of heart to left eye and left side of head ; general fulness of forepart of head, with occasional slight pains in left hypochondrium. Throbbing in occiput. θ Phrenitis. Great sensitiveness of brain. θ Phrenitis. Inflammatory affections of the brain. Heavy pain along coronal suture, extending backward and occupying all of parietal portion, at 10 A. M. ; was not > by dinner, warmth, or cold, and continued without variation until 4 P. M. ; walking in open air for one hour did not change the pain.

eyes.text: Diminished vision. Several sharp cutting pains across left eyeball at night in bed ; smarting and heaviness in eyelids in evening. *. A kind of sudden jerk of both eyeballs for a second. Throbbing in left eye. Pain from right eyeball up into anterior portion of brain, with soreness of orb to touch. Feeling of dryness and uneasiness in right eye and nostril. *. Eyes feel sore and as if they were inflamed. Cutting pain across left eyeball, with flow of tears in morning in bed. *. Smarting in eyelids ; in evening accompanied by pricking in skin. *. Itching and smarting around eyes, especially in inner canthi. Dull pain over left eye as if headache would set in, continued all day. Dull, pressive pain over right eye on awaking in morning. *.

ears.text: Occasionally sensation in right ear as if water was in it, it appears and disappears suddenly. Pain from toothache extends into ear. Sudden jerking pains in left ear and a cold feeling in a small spot in meatus. *.

face.text: Face flushed and hot. Face rose red during coughing spells. θ Laryngeal phthisis. Quivering of lower lip. *. Lips dry and disposed to chap. Trismus.

stomach_abdomen.text: APPETITE, THIRST. DESIRES, AVERSIONS. [14] [Chr. ac.]. No appetite for breakfast. Unusual hunger in middle of day. *. After breakfast and dinner, musty smell in posterior nares. After dinner, 2 P. M., a qualmishness of stomach lasting until 4 P. M. Half an hour after a simple supper, nausea gradually increasing, with sensation as if a stool would follow. While eating, sensation as if exhaled air smelled putrid, smells the food repeatedly to satisfy himself that it is not putrid. Nausea, transient at different times, especially when the stomach is empty. Several times vomiting of food, and afterwards three times of bile, with much retching at intervals of five to ten minutes, with warm sweat and usual heat. Sudden inclination to vomit in morning while dressing, with flow of water in mouth and dull pressure in stomach. Retching with cough and sore throat at night. Vomits his breakfast. Frequent aching and shooting pains in epigastrium. Pinching pain in epigastrium. Between the attacks of vomiting a kind of pressure and fulness in stomach, so that he is obliged to loosen his clothes. Soon after last vomiting, sleep for half an hour, after which slight heaviness or pressure in stomach. Occasional slight pains in left hypochondrium. Pressive pain in right hypochondrium in morning on awaking. *. Woke at 4 A. M. with sick feeling in abdomen, which was very tender to touch, especially along colon ; at 6 o'clock nausea and frequent eructations with retching, which brought up white mucus. Awoke at 5 A. M. very restless, could not lie quiet five minutes at a time ; at 6 a very sharp pain was experienced in hypogastric region and along ascending colon, growing very acute and lasting half an hour, then relieved by a profuse diarrhœa lasting three hours ; when these symptoms ceased the same headache returned, and soon was followed by the same sick stomach, lasting as on the first day till 4 P. M. Uneasiness in bowels before rising in morning, similar to premonitory symptoms of diarrhœa, > after rising. Awoke with pain in colon, accompanied by rumbling and wind, but passed off on rising. Flatulence and rumbling in abdomen. *. In evening disagreeable, violent pain, like flatulence, in r. side from lumbar region round to cecum, brought on by any movement of the trunk, or by deep inspiration ; not felt in sitting or lying still. *. Pain in loins and right side, in morning in bed, > on getting up.

female.text: (OBS :) Uterine hemorrhage. (OBS :) Leucorrhœa. PREGNANCY. PARTURITION. LACTATION. [24] [Chr. ac.]. Foul smelling sanious lochia.

respiratory.text: VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Chr. ac.]. Consumption of larynx, with very red face during attacks of coughing. (OBS :) Œdema of glottis. During expiration, fetid, musty smell from posterior nares. Coughing caused very violent pain over whole upper left part of chest, and deep coughing was impossible. Feeling of fulness in head, with sensation of rawness or soreness in chest and a slight, dry, hacking cough. Redness of face during cough. θ Laryngeal phthisis. Cough hard, sometimes deep ; swallows sputa, vomits breakfast.

chest_heart.text: Pressure on chest. In the night a severe boring pain in left side of chest below axilla, about the fourth rib, not < by motion or respiration, goes off on turning on right side. *. Deep-seated pain in back of left side of chest, and corresponding place in front, with a feeling of deep inspiration as if root of lung could not expand and was painful. *. In drawing a long breath, a stitch in upper left part of chest near the shoulder. Slight pain in left lung with throbbing pulsation in it. Throbbing pulsation through chest with cold feet, in daytime. Sensation of emptiness in chest, with soreness and pressure about chest, and cold feet. Weakness of chest and a kind of twitching in left knee joint. Lightness at heart ; as if a vacuum was there. Angina waking at night, pains much, short hacking and retching. In evening in bed, pain in region of heart, a fine drawing, nervous pain, at times reaching through chest to shoulder and neck ; on lying on heart, a sort of clucking, painful sensation on deep inspiration. *. Fixed pressive pain at apex of heart. *. Pain under apex of heart awoke him. *. Suddenly a violent stitch in region of heart ; pain disappears gradually after several minutes. Pulse full and slightly accelerated. Pulse below 50. Normal pulse being about 52 to 56, it varied during the two weeks proving between 48 and 84. Pulse 48, at 7 A. M., 7th and 8th days, 62 to 64 in afternoon and evening. Pulse mostly 72 in morning, and 84 at 4 P. M. In second proving, from 52 to 70, and from 58 to 75 in afternoon.

back.text: Turning of head towards left and backward was impossible. Cold sensation on back of neck, at 10 A. M. Stiffness of muscles on left side of back and neck, with stricture in chest in region of heart. Heavy pains in muscles of neck and shoulders, and various parts of trunk, soon went off and were only slightly felt in back during day. *. For almost three weeks an apparently deep-seated pain with distress, at times more severe, at others less, in left shoulder, shoulder blade and left part of back of neck up to occiput ; the least pains were felt when standing and walking. All muscles connected with the shoulder blade were more or less affected and painful to touch. The pain moved from left shoulder blade down to pelvis, and lumbar region was sensitive. Dull pain at inner angle of left scapula in evening, and at inferior angles of both in morning. *. Rheumatic pains about right shoulder and various parts of back. *. Superficial burning pains about middle dorsal spines, with sudden jerking pains in left ear and cold feeling in a small spot in meatus. *. Pains in back and loins. *. Pain in loin, seems to arise in a spot which is tender to pressure, about an inch to right of middle lumbar spine. *. Lumbar pain most painful in morning in bed. *. Pain in lumbar region (lumbago) as if a change of position would ameliorate ; desire to stretch out straight. Shooting pain from small of back into left hip bone. Weakness and pain in small of back and sharp shooting from lumbar vertebræ to crest of ilium on right side.

modalities.text: REST. POSITION. MOTION. [35] [Chr. ac.]. In bed : severe pain in thighs. On lying on heart : painful sensation on deep inspiration. On lying down : cannot fall asleep. Sitting or lying still : > pain in right side from lumbar region round to cecum. Rising from a lying position caused much pain. After rising : in morning, uneasiness in bowels > ; pain in loins and right side >. Obliged to change position during pain between head, left shoulder blade and shoulder. At night sleep was impaired, as only certain positions were endurable. Obliged to get up and walk about : after attack of toothache ; in evening. Movement of trunk brings on violent pain in right side from lumbar region round to cecum. While walking : lightness in head. Quick walking : gives relief ; > the nausea which precedes each attack of vomiting. On going down-stairs : giddiness. On turning on right side : pain in chest better. The slightest motion of affected parts was very painful. At night : cutting pains across left eyeball ; toothache ; sore throat awakens ; retching cough and sore throat ; itching in armpits ; good sleep ; dreams much. At 2 A. M. : pulse 48. At 4 A. M. : woke with sick feeling in abdomen. At 5 A. M. : fulness in upper and forepart of head ; awoke very restless ; could not lie quiet five minutes ; boring pain in left side of chest ; angina. In morning : in bed, flow of tears, with cutting pain across l. eyeball ; on waking dull, pressive pain over right eye ; toothache ; hawking of phlegm ; nausea ; pains in left hypochondrium ; uneasiness in bowels before rising ; pain in loins and right side ; pulse 72 ; pain at inferior angles of both scapulæ ; in bed, lumbar pain < ; pain in left scapula < ; transitory pains in elbows ; itching in palm of hand ; uneasiness, stiffness and pain in muscles ; had a dream. At 6 A. M. : nausea ; sharp pain in hypogastric region and along ascending colon. In forenoon : dull confusion in head. At 10 o'clock : lightness in head. From 10 A. M. to 4 P. M. : pain along coronal suture ; cold sensation in back of neck. Middle of day : unusual hunger. Afternoon : ranula with dry mouth ; pulse 62 to 64 ; 58 to 75 ; rheumatic feeling in right knee. From 2 to 4 P. M. : qualmishness. All day : pain over left eye. In daytime : pulsation through chest with cold feet ; sleepiness. In evening : lightness at heart as of a vacuum ; smarting and heaviness in eyelids ; smarting in eyelids with pricking in skin ; pain-like flatulence ; pain in region of heart ; pulse 62 to 64 ; pain at inner angle of left scapula ; itching of feet and various parts ; pricking and itching here and there ; uneasiness in limbs. At 10 P. M. : violent toothache. The least draught of air < pain. Warmth : does not > pain along coronal suture. Cold : does not > pain along coronal suture. Cold water : produced pain in teeth ; pain < by. Cold water and a strong draught of air cause or increase pain. Walking in open air : did not > pain along coronal suture.

sleep.text: Notwithstanding good sleep at night, great sleepiness in daytime ; but if he lies down for a nap, cannot fall asleep. Excessively sleepy one hour before bedtime. Fell asleep late. Wakes up at early dawn and cannot fall asleep. Going to sleep late, much restlessness and very anxious dreams, dreams not recollected. Vivid dreams ; awoke early with pains suddenly shifting to various parts of trunk ; dull pain at one time at inferior angles of scapulæ, then pressure in right hypochondrium, at edge of false ribs, then in region of bladder ; pain, dull, pressive, over right eye. *. Had a dream in morning, with pain under apex of heart, which awoke him. *. Dreams much all night ; he rides on horseback through a stream, and after crossing the water it freezes on him. Dreams unpleasant ; about to be put to death by poison, while innocent of crime. Dreamed that he had an attack of strangury, which the next morning proved to be the fact, and which he did not get over for two hours.

fever_chill.text: Cold head and feet. Sensation of general coldness which continued for one week ; could not get warm at all.

skin.text: Mostly in evening disagreeable pricking and itching here and there, with uneasiness in limbs, so that he was obliged to get up from sitting or lying and walk about. Pricking in skin, in various parts, accompanies smarting in eyelids. *. (OBS :) Causes the disappearance of warts. (OBS :) Hospital gangrene ; phagedenic ulcers ; bites of rabid animals ; poisoned wounds.

_raw: Workmen engaged in the manufacture of anhydro-chromate of potassium are liable to symptoms like secondary syphilis. Small doses of corrosive sublimate have been found the remedy
Daphne indica cured the rheumatic pain
Compare : Kali bich. derived from the same metal
